Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class TestFactoryCreation

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTests
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.TestFactoryCreation
public class TestFactoryCreation extends AbstractTests
Unit tests about factory creation.

  • Field Summary

    TestFactoryCreation()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    datatypeMissingDirectDependencies()
    Ensures that a factory cannot be created with a datatype without its direct dependencies.
    void
    datatypeMissingIndirectDependencies()
    Ensures that a factory cannot be created with a datatype without its direct dependencies.
    void
    differentOneExtension()
    Ensures that two factories with different extensions are different.
    void
    incompleteDatatype()
    Ensures that a factory cannot be created with an incomplete set of extensions from a datatype.
    void
    oneDatatype()
    Ensures that two factories with the same datatype are the same.
    void
    sameOneExtension()
    Ensures that two factories with the same extension are the same.
    void
    simpleFactory()
    Ensures that a factory without extension is the same as the default factory.
    void
    twoExtensions()
    Ensures that two factories with the same extensions are the same, even if the extensions are listed in a different order.
    void
    typeConstructorWithPredicateChild()
    Ensures that a factory cannot be created with a type constructor that takes a predicate parameter.

  • Method Details

    • simpleFactory

      public void simpleFactory()
      Ensures that a factory without extension is the same as the default factory.

    • sameOneExtension

      public void sameOneExtension()
      Ensures that two factories with the same extension are the same.

    • differentOneExtension

      public void differentOneExtension()
      Ensures that two factories with different extensions are different.

    • oneDatatype

      public void oneDatatype()
      Ensures that two factories with the same datatype are the same.

    • twoExtensions

      public void twoExtensions()
      Ensures that two factories with the same extensions are the same, even if the extensions are listed in a different order.

    • incompleteDatatype

      public void incompleteDatatype()
      Ensures that a factory cannot be created with an incomplete set of extensions from a datatype.

    • datatypeMissingDirectDependencies

      public void datatypeMissingDirectDependencies()
      Ensures that a factory cannot be created with a datatype without its direct dependencies.

    • datatypeMissingIndirectDependencies

      public void datatypeMissingIndirectDependencies()
      Ensures that a factory cannot be created with a datatype without its direct dependencies.

    • typeConstructorWithPredicateChild

      public void typeConstructorWithPredicateChild()
      Ensures that a factory cannot be created with a type constructor that takes a predicate parameter.
